news.summary: South San Francisco, CA and San Diego - On July 3, 2025, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), a clinical stage oncology company, revealed that as of July 1, 2025, they granted 9,000 non-qualified stock options along with 1,600 restricted stock units to a recent non-executive hire who joined in June 2025. ORIC focuses on developing therapies targeting therapeutic resistance mechanisms.
news.headline: ORIC granted 9,000 stock options and 1,600 stock units on July 1, 2025, to a new non-executive employee. #ORIC #stocks

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: USCB) announced that they will disclose their financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, post-market closure on July 24, 2025.
news.headline: USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. will report Q2 2025 results on July 24, 2025, after market close.

news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - On July 3, 2025, Emeren Group Ltd revealed a change in leadership for its North America operations. Emeren, a prominent global solar project developer, owner, and operator, listed on the NYSE under the symbol SOL, shared the news. The transition will involve Mr. Cameron "Mac" Moore taking on a key role within the company. More information can be found on Emeren's website at www.emeren.com.
news.headline: Emeren Group Ltd announces leadership change in North America & preliminary Q2 2025 results. Visit www.emeren.com for details.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, a national nonprofit organization, Shatterproof, praised the One Big Beautiful Bill Act for including a significant public health policy. The policy involves the permanent closure of the de minimis loophole to combat the addiction crisis in the United States. This move is crucial for prioritizing public health and addressing the issues surrounding addiction.
news.headline: Shatterproof praises inclusion of permanent closure of de minimis loophole in the One Big Beautiful Bill Act.
SUPREME COURT CLEARS TRUMP TO SEND MIGRANTS TO SOUTH SUDAN

news.summary: Houston-based MV Oil Trust (NYSE: MVO) has disclosed its Trust distribution for the quarterly payment period concluding on June 30, 2025. Unitholders registered on July 15, 2025, are set to obtain a $2,127,500 distribution, translating to $0.185 per unit, which will be disbursed on July 25, 2025. The numbers for this period are as follows: Volume pumped stood at 145,027 barrels of oil equivalent (BOE), sold at an average price of $59.82 per BOE, generating gross proceeds worth $8,675,538. After deducting costs totaling $5,725,946, net profits summed up to $2,949,592.
news.headline: MV Oil Trust (NYSE: MVO) to distribute $2,127,500 ($0.185/unit) to unitholders for Q2 profits ending June 30, 2025.

news.summary: Dallas-based Generational Group recently facilitated the sale of Superior Petroleum Equipment, LLC to Ashe Beach Companies. The acquisition, completed on June 10, 2025, marks a significant event in the company's history. Founded in 2006 and located in Grove City, Ohio, Superior Petroleum Equipment, LLC is a reputable full-service petroleum equipment company. Specializing in installation, maintenance, repair, and removal services, the company has established a strong foothold in the industry. This acquisition underscores the continued growth and expansion of both entities, showcasing a strategic move that will shape their future endeavors.
news.headline: Generational Group advises sale of Superior Petroleum Equipment, LLC to Ashe Beach Companies in June 2025. Full-service company founded in 2006 in Grove City, Ohio.

news.summary: Denver-based Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025, concluding on June 30. The report is scheduled to be made public after the market closes on July 23, 2025. A conference call will follow the release at 8:00 a.m. Mountain Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern Time) on July 24, 2025, featuring insights from Ron Gusek, the President and Chief Executive Officer, and Michael Stock, the Chief Financial Officer.
news.headline: Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) to release Q2 2025 financial results on July 23, 2025, with a conference call on July 24 at 8:00 a.m. MT.

news.summary: Announced on July 3, 2025, in Knoxville, Tennessee, Streamline®, a leading enterprise-level property management software (PMS) within the Inhabit® ecosystem, revealed a significant strategic collaboration with Casago®, a top vacation rental property management firm. This partnership aims to leverage their expertise and resources to enhance services for the vacation rental industry.
news.headline: Streamline and Casago partner to revolutionize short-term rental operations globally. Major strategic alliance in PMS industry.

news.summary: According to traders, a potential rally in Ethereum (ETH) could see the digital currency surge to $3,200 due to a "golden cross" pattern forming. However, several other metrics regarding the price of Ether are not as optimistic as this scenario.
news.headline: Traders eye $3.2K for ETH as 'golden cross' emerges, conflicting with derivatives data. Bullish ETH rally possible.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Reno, Nevada, Source Agriculture Corp revealed their investment in Hydrosat, a company aiming to address worldwide issues of water scarcity and food insecurity by utilizing space technology. Source Agriculture Corp, a prominent investor in land acquisition and agricultural technology, is excited to support Hydrosat in this crucial mission.
news.headline: Source Agriculture invests in Hydrosat for water efficiency. Significant investment made for revolutionizing crop yields.

news.summary: On June 19, 2025, McEwen Mining Inc. (NYSE: MUX) (TSX: MUX) held its Annual Meeting of Shareholders, receiving approval for a name change to McEwen Inc. The Articles of Amendment for this change were filed with the Secretary of State, with the new name set to take effect on July 7, 2025. Trading under the new name on the NYSE will commence on the same day, followed by the TSX shortly after. Notably, there will be no alterations to the Company’s CUSIP or stock symbol in this process.
news.headline: McEwen Mining changes name to McEwen Inc., following shareholder approval; trading on NYSE as McEwen Inc. from July 7, 2025.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, AMH, a prominent company listed on NYSE under the ticker AMH, specializing in owning, operating, and developing single-family rental homes, revealed that it is set to disclose its financial and operating performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Thursday, July 31, 2025. This announcement signifies a significant update for stakeholders and investors keen on the company's progress during this period.
news.headline: AMH to release Q2 2025 results on July 31, 2025, after conference call. Leading SF rental homes co.
US bank deposits rose to $18.312 tln from $18.205 tln in the prior week.

news.summary: A company based in McLean, Va., Bublup, unveiled a new import tool geared towards users of Pocket, a read-it-later app set to close its operations on July 8, 2025. After October 8, 2025, Pocket users will no longer have access to their exportable content, necessitating the preservation of saved web articles and resources. Given the millions of users impacted, Bublup's import tool offers a crucial solution for users looking to retain their content.
news.headline: Bublup introduces Pocket import tool for users before Pocket shutdown on July 8, 2025; millions of users affected.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on July 01, 2025, LENSAR, Inc. revealed that the majority of independent board members approved granting 660 restricted stock units (RSUs) to three new non-executive employees. These RSUs were given on July 1, 2025, as part of their hiring packages. The decision to grant the RSUs adheres to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). LENSAR, Inc. is listed as LNSR on the Nasdaq stock exchange.
news.headline: LENSAR grants 660 RSUs to 3 new hires as inducement for joining the company, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: In San Jose, California and Milwaukee, an announcement was made on June 23, 2025, that any new product or service of significant importance must obtain approval from the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS). This confirmation from NYDFS was not obtained as of the mentioned date. The revised statement now reveals the collaboration between Fiserv and PayPal to enhance stablecoin payments. The partnership strives to promote compatibility between FIUSD and PayPal USD, eliminating obstacles and fostering seamless transactions.
news.headline: Fiserv and PayPal enhance partnership, focusing on stablecoin payments with aim for FIUSD and PayPal USD interoperability.

news.summary: On June 30, 2025, Akebia Therapeutics Inc. in Cambridge, Mass., provided four new employees with the opportunity to buy a total of 141,800 shares of the company's common stock. These stock options were granted as a significant enticement for the employees joining the firm. This action aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and reflects Akebia's commitment to enhancing the quality of life for those affected by kidney disease. Akebia Therapeutics Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AKBA.
news.headline: Akebia Therapeutics grants 4 new employees options to purchase 141,800 shares of common stock on June 30, 2025.

news.summary: In Rochester, New York, on July 01, 2025, Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a prominent beverage alcohol company, released its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026. The President and Chief Executive Officer, Bill Newlands, and Chief Financial Officer, Garth Hankinson, will conduct a conference call on Wednesday, July 2, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results and future outlook. For more details on joining the conference call or accessing a live, listen-only webcast, visit ir.cbrands.com.
news.headline: Constellation Brands releases Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Jul 1, 2025. Conference call on Jul 2 at 10:30 a.m. ET. Visit ir.cbrands.com for details.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on July 3, 2025, Atlas Ocean Voyages revealed exciting plans for the 2026 Arctic season. The renowned company will be launching the Canadian Arctic Discovery 17-night expedition aboard the World Voyager. Expedition Team Leaders for this upcoming journey have been appointed to ensure a successful and enriching experience for travelers. Those interested in more details and imagery can download the information online. This new polar expedition promises to be a remarkable adventure for all participants.
news.headline: Atlas Ocean Voyages launches new 17-night Canadian Arctic expedition aboard World Voyager in Sep 2026.

news.summary: Dallas-based Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) is set to hold a conference call on August 7, 2025, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its Fiscal 2025 third quarter financial performance. The results are scheduled to be disclosed on August 6, 2025, after the market closes. For those interested, the call can be accessed by dialing the toll-free or international numbers provided. Additionally, it will be available for streaming on the company's website, www.atmosenergy.com.
news.headline: Atmos Energy Corp to discuss Fiscal 2025 Q3 results on August 7, 2025, released on August 6, 2025. Conference call at 10am Eastern. Website: www.atmosenergy.com.

news.summary: Sienna Senior Living Inc. will release its second quarter results for 2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, August 12. The company's President and CEO, Nitin Jain, along with David Hung, the CFO and Executive VP of Investments, will lead a conference call for investors on Wednesday, August 13 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Sienna's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol SIA.
news.headline: Sienna Senior Living Inc. (TSX: SIA) to report Q2 results on Aug 12, 2025 after market close. Conference call on Aug 13 at 10am. CEO and CFO will host.

(NASDAQ: MMSI), based in South Jordan, Utah, disclosed its intention to announce the financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, post the stock market's closure on Wednesday, July 30, 2025. news.summary: In Shenzhen on July 3, 2025, MingZhu Logistics Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: YGMZ) disclosed its agreement to acquire 100% equity of Shenzhen Mingzhuchun Wine Co., Ltd. Mingzhuchun manages its liquor distribution business through its two subsidiaries, Xiamen Bainian Qianzhuang Wine Group Co., Ltd. and Ningde Mingfu Wine Co., Ltd., in China. MingZhu is renowned for providing top-notch logistics and transportation services to various enterprises.
news.headline: MingZhu Logistics acquires Mingzhuchun; buys 100% equity through Share Purchase Agreement, including Xiamen Bainian & Ningde Mingfu.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, The Honest Company (NASDAQ: HNST) disclosed an inducement grant to Mr. Curtiss Bruce, who joined as the new EVP, Chief Financial Officer on June 2, 2025. The grant, totaling 202,880 restricted stock units, was awarded under The Honest Company, Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan, ratified on March 14, 2023, by the Company’s Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors.
news.headline: The Honest Company grants 202,880 restricted stock units to new CFO under inducement plan on June 2, 2025.

news.summary: In Covington, Louisiana on July 3, 2025, Pool Corporation (Nasdaq/GSM: POOL) revealed the publication of its latest Corporate Responsibility Report for the year 2024.

news.summary: PennantPark Investment Corporation (NYSE: PNNT) will release its financial results for the third fiscal quarter ending on June 30, 2025, on Monday, August 11, 2025, after the market closes. news.headline: PennantPark Investment Corp plans to release Q3 2025 results on Aug 11, 2025, after market close.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SYRE) based in Waltham, Massachusetts, revealed that the company's Compensation Committee approved the issuance of stock options. These options allow the purchase of a total of 121,600 shares of Spyre's common stock to four non-executive employees. The stock options are part of the equity inducement awards under the Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. 2018 Equity Inducement Plan. The approval was granted on July 1, 2025. This move was significant for each employee's decision to join Spyre and aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Spyre focuses on utilizing advanced antibody engineering, dose optimization, and rational therapeutic combinations to enhance efficacy and convenience in treating immune-mediated diseases such as IBD.
news.headline: Spyre Therapeutics granted 121,600 stock options to four non-executive employees on July 1, 2025, to enhance employment offers.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCRX) based in Brisbane, California, disclosed the allocation of inducement awards to seven new employees on July 2, 2025. These awards were granted under Pacira’s Amended and Restated 2014 Inducement Plan, serving as a significant inducement for each employee’s recruitment. The awards, approved by the People & Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors without stockholder consent, adhere to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). This move signifies Pacira's commitment to attracting top talent while advancing non-opioid pain therapies for patient well-being.

news.summary: In Tokyo on July 3, 2025, Linkage Global Inc, also known as Linkage Cayman, a company based in Japan that offers cross-border e-commerce integrated services, revealed its unaudited financial report for the six months concluding on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Linkage Global Inc reports financial results for H1 2025. headquartered in Japan, unaudited results for the six months ended March 31, 2025.

news.summary: In Hong Kong, Alibaba Group Holding Limited disclosed the pricing of its private offering, termed the "Bond Offering," for HK$12.023 billion in aggregate principal amount of Zero Coupon Exchangeable Bonds due 2032. The Bonds are referenced to the ordinary shares of Alibaba Health Information Technology Limited listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The offering was made under the tickers NYSE: BABA, HKEX: 9988 (HKD Counter), and 89988 (RMB Counter).
news.headline: Alibaba Group priced HK$12.023 billion Zero Coupon Exchangeable Bonds due 2032 referencing Alibaba Health shares.

news.summary: Malaysia-based beauty and personal care brand, Empro Group Inc. (EMPG), has successfully completed its initial public offering on July 3, 2025. The offering consisted of 1,375,000 ordinary shares set at $4.00 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of around $5,500,000 before deduction of underwriting discounts and other expenses. Trading of the Ordinary Shares commenced on the Nasdaq Capital Market on July 2, 2025, identified by the ticker symbol "EMPG". Additionally, EMPG has granted the underwriter the option to acquire up to 206,250 extra Ordinary Shares at the initial public offering price within 45 days from the Registration Statement's effective date.
news.headline: Empro Group Inc.'s $5.5 million IPO of 1,375,000 shares closed, priced at $4.00 each on July 3, 2025, trading under "EMPG" on Nasdaq.
